insightsCta.headline: Proven results.
insightsCta.subtitle: Leading companies already use conversational AI to sell more, serve better, and scale without growing headcount.

cases.highlight: AI assistant with personalized recommendations transformed the online shopping experience.
Generative AI understands natural language, slang and emojis for grocery shopping on WhatsApp.
Absorbed a 690% spike in contacts without hiring, saving 1,300 hours in 6 months.
Hybrid model with 3 AI personas serves 3 brands while maintaining personality and empathy.

companyNumbers.headline: A platform built to
companyNumbers.disclaimer: Internal metrics — Catalisa platform operational data

retailCases.headline: Retail already selling
retailCases.subtitle: Leading retailers using conversational AI and WhatsApp to convert more and serve better.

cases.highlight: AI assistant with personalized recommendations by skin profile and preferences. Automated consultative shopping experience.
Lu got a generative AI brain and became an active seller inside WhatsApp, recommending products via natural language.
3 AI personas serve 3 brands with distinct personality and empathy. Hybrid human + AI model that never loses its tone.
AI with advanced NLU drastically reduced human agent needs while maintaining customer satisfaction above 90%.

fintechCases.headline: Banks already operating
fintechCases.subtitle: From major Brazilian banks to global fintechs — conversational AI is already a reality in financial services.

cases.highlight: BIA (Bradesco) handles 300M interactions/month. Itaú has 150+ GenAI solutions in production. Nubank uses AI for 100M+ customers.
Autonomous agents on WhatsApp resolve demands without transferring to humans. Significant reduction in repeat calls and service time.
PicPay launched Pix on WhatsApp with AI that interprets audio, images and messages. BTG awarded for innovation in banking AI support.
DBS deployed GenAI for all corporate clients. HDFC reached 85% accuracy with EVA. Absa is the first African bank with agentic AI.

insuranceCases.headline: Insurers already automating
insuranceCases.subtitle: From 2-second claims to humanized support — AI is transforming the insurance industry.

cases.highlight: AI Maya handles quoting and contracting. AI Jim processes claims in record time — one was paid in 2 seconds. NPS of 4.9/5.
Customer reports claim, sends photos, receives assessment and tracks status — all via WhatsApp with specialized AI agents.
AI agent collects data via natural conversation, calculates premium and presents options — no forms, no waiting, no calls.
Customer sends vehicle photos via WhatsApp. AI analyzes damage, classifies severity and generates preliminary report automatically.

investmentROI.headline: R$2M in capital.
thesisBullets: Low marginal cost: 65% of WhatsApp messages are free (service window)
Predictable scale: infra grows only R$6K per 30K users
Market-validated pricing: 2-5x cheaper than competitors with a more complete product
Healthy margins: 43-83% (above AI-First SaaS benchmark of 55-70%)
Fast break-even: month 11, payback month 18, 4x ROI in 24 months
